sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - KATHARINA von Klingen (-1296).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THIEBAUT de Ferrette m firstly (before Oct 1273) as her second husband, KATHARINA von Klingen, widow of RUDOLF von Lichtenberg, daughter of WALTER [III] Herr von Klingen & his wife Sophie --- (-1296).
Legacy NFS Source: Princess of Altenklingen, Katharina Altenklingen -

zh.lifeSummary: 當Katharina von Klingen於大約1255年出生在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根時，她的父親Walther Von Klingen36歲，母親Sophie von Froburg31歲。她於1279年8月12日與Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年在德國爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katharina von Klingen于大约1255年出生在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根时，她的父亲Walther Von Klingen36岁，母亲Sophie von Froburg31岁。她于1279年8月12日与Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette在瑞士瑟爾高恩望阿爾騰可林根结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年在德国爾特波格奧拉赤 斯圖特加特享年42岁。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Katharina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Katharina von Klingen was born about 1255, in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Switzerland, her father, Walther Von Klingen, was 36 and her mother, Sophie von Froburg, was 31. She married Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette on 12 August 1279, in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1296, in Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katharina von Klingen est née environ 1255, à Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovie, Suisse, son père, Walther Von Klingen, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Sophie von Froburg, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette le 12 août 1279, à Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovie, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1296, à Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katharina von Klingen um 1255 in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Schweiz geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walther Von Klingen 36 und ihre Mutter Sophie von Froburg 31. Sie hat am 12. August 1279 in Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Schweiz Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1296 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katharina von Klingen è nata il circa 1255 nel Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovia, Svizzera, sua padre, Walther Von Klingen, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Sophie von Froburg, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette il 12 agosto 1279, nel Altenklingen, Engwang, Turgovia, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1296, nel Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katharina von Klingenが約1255年にスイススウルガウエングワンアルテンクリンジェンで生まれた時，父Walther Von Klingenは36歳，母Sophie von Froburgは31歳であった。1279年8月12日にスイススウルガウエングワンアルテンクリンジェンでTheobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferretteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年にドイツウuルッテンバーグオバーアムト ストゥットガートで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katharina von Klingen(이)가 대략 1255년 스위스 스르가 잉왕 알텐클링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walther Von Klingen(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophie von Froburg(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1279년 8월 12일 스위스 스르가 잉왕 알텐클링에서 Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 독일 wu르테버그 오베램트 스투트가트에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katharina von Klingen nasceu aproximadamente 1255, em Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiça, seu pai, Walther Von Klingen, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Sophie von Froburg, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette em 12 de agosto de 1279, em Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1296, em Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katharina von Klingen родилась около 1255 г. в местности алтенклинген, энгванг, тургау, Швейцария, её отцу по имени Walther Von Klingen было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophie von Froburg, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette 12 августа 1279 г. в местности алтенклинген, энгванг, тургау, Швейцария. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1296 г. в местности обирамт стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katharina von Klingen nació aproximadamente 1255, en Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiza, su papá, Walther Von Klingen, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Sophie von Froburg, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Theobald von Pfirt II Count of Ferrette el 12 de agosto de 1279, en Altenklingen, Engwang, Thurgau, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1296, en Oberamt Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 42 años.
